User Story: Deliver Secure and Accountable Monitoring Access Governance
Title: Establish Secure and Accountable Monitoring Access Framework
Description: Business Objective: Protect monitoring workflows so only authorized staff can view, change, and act on sensitive operational information. | Scope: Include oversight practices, evidence retention expectations, and operating guidance to sustain reliable daily use. | Implementation Guidance: Develop a system that records activity history, preserves required evidence, and guides teams through repeatable operations. | Expected Outcome: Operations teams can run the capability confidently with traceable oversight and repeatable execution.

Title: Configure Secure and Accountable Monitoring Access Components
Description: Business Objective: Protect monitoring workflows so only authorized staff can view, change, and act on sensitive operational information. | Scope: Create the initial secure and accountable monitoring access capability by defining participating assets, ownership assignments, and usage boundaries. | Implementation Guidance: Create a mechanism that captures operational context, ownership, and classification information for controlled use. | Expected Outcome: Operations teams can start using secure and accountable monitoring access with clear accountability and consistent setup standards.

Title: Implement Secure and Accountable Monitoring Access Decision Rules
Description: Business Objective: Protect monitoring workflows so only authorized staff can view, change, and act on sensitive operational information. | Scope: Include business rules for prioritization, severity handling, and response timing so teams can act consistently. | Implementation Guidance: Establish a process that applies configurable decision criteria and escalation pathways to operational conditions. | Expected Outcome: Operations teams can prioritize work using agreed decision rules and respond with consistent urgency.
